title: telemetry-otel — pipeline meta-metrics
description: Metrics ABOUT the OTel pipeline itself. Every application module publishes its own metrics through this module; those live in the module's own metrics.json. Here we only capture pipeline health.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.recorded_total
metrics.description: Total spans recorded before export. kind = server / client / internal / producer / consumer.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.exported_total
metrics.description: outcome = success / failure. Failures usually indicate exporter or network issues.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.spans.dropped_total
metrics.description: Reasons: queue_full / sampler_reject / exporter_reject / kill_switched. queue_full > 0 indicates backpressure.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.export.duration_ms
metrics.description: signal = traces / metrics. Duration of one batch export.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.buffer.depth
metrics.description: Current in-process buffer depth. Observable gauge polled at scrape.

metrics.name: academorix.otel.sampled_ratio
metrics.description: Rolling ratio of sampled vs total traces over last 5 minutes.
